external.title: a group of men in military uniforms walking on a runway with the words let 's do this written on the bottom

record.text: Back to work on PowerShell Universal! Events like the PowerShell Summit always renew my excitement because I get to see the impact of what I do day to day. It's not all bugs. It's real people building real solutions. Really cool ones!
